name: Quick Coney Islands
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a skillet.
2. Add 1/2 cup of onion and celery to the skillet; cook until almost tender.
3. Drain off excess fat from the beef.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: celery, garlic, salt, tomato sauce, hot sauce, and pepper.
5. Simmer the mixture for 15 minutes.
6. Warm the buns in an oven or toaster.
7. Heat the frankfurters in a small amount of water until warmed through.
8. Spread mustard on each bun.
9. Place one frank inside each bun.
10. Spoon hot coney sauce over the frank.
11. Add the remaining onions on top for serving.
